task_description: Fix 3 remaining OPEN issues from FULL_ARCHITECTURE_MAP.md: subscriptions table name collision, legacy tag duplication, and leaderboard caching. Update the architecture map to mark them RESOLVED.

verification.summary: npx tsc --noEmit passes. npx vitest run passes (435 tests, 38 files). New leaderboard-cache.test.ts validates cache key pattern, TTL, and integration with 5 meaningful tests.
